title: Magnesium Glycinate vs Citrate: Sleep, Anxiety, Absorption (2026)
description: Magnesium glycinate and citrate both absorb well — but one has a dedicated 2025 RCT for sleep (n=155) and the other doesn't. The difference matters more than dosing labels admit.
seoTitle: Magnesium Glycinate vs Citrate: Sleep & Anxiety (2026)
seoDescription: Magnesium glycinate vs citrate compared by bioavailability, sleep RCT evidence, anxiety data, and cost. Which form the 2025 bisglycinate trial picked as winner.
imageAlt: Side-by-side crystalline mineral structures — emerald glycinate and amber citrate — against a dark observation chamber background
